topic: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I ate rice yesterday. I was eating food when he came. I had eaten food before he came. I had been studying for an hour. She went to school last year.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She was working when I arrived. She had finished her work before I arrived. She had been working for two hours. They went to school yesterday. They were playing when I called.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मेरे बताने से पहले उन्होंने homework कर लिया था।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They had done their homework before I told them.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I had been studying for an hour yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I had been studying for an hour.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I exercised in the morning. I was reading when you came. I had read this book before you came. I had been reading this book for three hours.
